narrative:
Brookville-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,129 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
